title: The Impact of Trump-Era Tariffs on Financial Market Efficiency
abstract: arXiv:2602.00548v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: This study examines the effects of Trump-era tariffs on financial market efficiency by applying multifractal detrended fluctuation analysis to the return and absolute return time series of six major financial assets: the S\&P 500, SSEC, VIX, BTC/USD, EUR/USD, and Gold. Using the Hurst exponent $h(2)$ and multifractal strength, we assess how market dynamics responded to two major global shocks: the COVID-19 pandemic and the implementation of the Trump tariff policy in 2025. The results show that COVID-19 induced substantial changes in both the Hurst exponent and multifractal strength, particularly for the S\&P 500, BTC/USD, EUR/USD, and Gold. In contrast, the effects of the Trump tariffs were more moderate but still observable across all examined time series. The Chinese market index (SSEC) remained largely unaffected by either event, apart from a distinct response to domestic stimulus measures. In addition, the VIX exhibited anti-per

translated_title: 特朗普时代关税对金融市场效率的影响
translated_abstract: 本研究通过将多重分形去趋势波动分析应用于六大主要金融资产（标普500指数、上证综指、VIX恐慌指数、比特币/美元、欧元/美元和黄金）的收益率和绝对收益率时间序列，考察了特朗普时代关税对金融市场效率的影响。我们利用赫斯特指数h(2)和多重分形强度，评估了市场动态对两次重大全球冲击（新冠疫情和2025年特朗普关税政策的实施）的响应。结果显示，新冠疫情导致赫斯特指数和多重分形强度发生显著变化，尤其是对标普500指数、比特币/美元、欧元/美元和黄金的影响。相比之下，特朗普关税的影响较为温和，但在所有被考察的时间序列中仍可观察到。中国股市指数（上证综指）对这两次事件基本未受影响，仅对国内刺激措施表现出明显反应。此外，VIX指数表现出反持续性特征。
tldr: 本研究通过多重分形分析发现，新冠疫情对全球金融市场效率的影响远大于特朗普关税，而中国股市对两者均不敏感。
en_tdlr: This study reveals through multifractal analysis that the COVID-19 pandemic had a far greater impact on global financial market efficiency than Trump-era tariffs, while the Chinese stock market remained largely unaffected by both events.
